stemHtml: Which one of following statements about the wing structure is correct?

options.a: A torsion box is formed by wing spars, ribs and wing skin reinforced by stringers.
options.b: A wing main spar consists of a web with stringers.
options.c: The slats are a part of the torsion box.
options.d: A wing structure is a semi-monocoque structure consisting of skin and frames.
